channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Airline Ticket Nightmare: A Cautionary Tale of Credit Card Points and Unreliable Rewards Programs
item.description: A traveler's nightmare: trying to book an airline ticket with credit card points only to be met with error messages, uncooperative customer service, and a refusal to refund points. One woman's story highlights the complexities and pitfalls of using rewards programs involving multiple airlines.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
